exercises.name: Dumbbell RDL + Row (Romanian Deadlift to Bent-Over Row)
exercises.cues: Hinge at hips with soft knees, keep back flat, lower dumbbells along legs, then row dumbbells to ribs squeezing the back

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Swing to Press
exercises.cues: Drive hips to swing dumbbell up, use momentum to press overhead, keep core braced and free arm out for balance

exercises.name: Push-Up + Plank Dumbbell Row
exercises.cues: Perform push-up gripping dumbbells, then row one dumbbell at a time in plank; keep hips square and core tight

exercises.name: Knee Tuck Crunch
exercises.cues: Lie back, draw knees toward chest while crunching, control the lower back, exhale at the top

exercises.name: Alternating V-Up (toe touch)
exercises.cues: Lift opposite hand to foot, keep legs straight as possible, engage abs, lower with control

exercises.name: Dynamic Plank
exercises.cues: Transition between forearm and high plank or shift body forward/back, keep core braced and hips level

notes: Structured as two rounds: Round 1 is full-body dumbbell strength (RDL+Row, Swing to Press, Push-Up+Row), Round 2 is core/abs (Knee Tuck Crunch, Alternating V-Up, Dynamic Plank). Caption suggests replacing summer cardio with this to build abs. Likely repeat circuit 2-3 rounds. Rest as needed between rounds; athlete checks watch for timing.
